headline: Bam Azizi, Mesh CEO: A Fortt Knox Conversation
summary: Mesh CEO Bam Azizi told Jon Fortt his thesis: crypto is "built by crypto bros for crypto bros" and doesn't pass the grandma test. Mesh — fresh off a $75M Series C at $1B led by Dragonfly — abstracts wallet/chain fragmentation so users tap-and-pay. Born in Iran during the Iran-Iraq war, PhD from TU Munich, sold prior startup NoPassword to LogMeIn (2019). Mesh pivoted from B2C to B2B in 2022, post-FTX. Big bet: agentic commerce + microtransactions.

Born in Iran during the Iran-Iraq war, PhD from TU Munich, sold prior startup NoPassword to LogMeIn (2019). Mesh pivoted from B2C to B2B in 2022, post-FTX. Big bet: agentic commerce + microtransactions.

headline: MoonPay Announces 'MoonAgents Card' Enabling AI Agents to Spend Stablecoins Anywhere Mastercard Is Accepted
summary: MoonPay, the leading crypto payments network, today announced it will launch MoonAgents Card, a virtual Mastercard debit card that lets users and AI agents spend stablecoins directly from their onchain balances. Through seamless crypto to fiat conversion at the point of purchase, the card can be used at any online merchant globally that accepts Mastercard.

raw.headline: MoonPay Announces 'MoonAgents Card' Enabling AI Agents to Spend Stablecoins Anywhere Mastercard Is Accepted
